name: Rigby South Park
description: Rigby South Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rigby, ID. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Rigby Tennis and Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Rigby Tennis and Pickleball in Rigby, ID! There are 4 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights and a pro shop or equipment store. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Fee is based on time reserved

name: The Drop 208 Pickleball Club
description: The Drop 208 Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rigby, ID. There are 5 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, youth programming, water, and restrooms. The courts can be reserved.
